HomePricingGet Started

Uptime and trust

Uptime is not just a number. It is a promise customers can see.

A status page gives your customers a calm, reliable place to check what is happening. That matters most when something is slow, degraded, or offline.

People trust what they can verify

When a business publishes uptime history, current incidents, and recent updates, customers do not have to guess whether the team is paying attention. They can see the service health for themselves.

Good communication lowers pressure

During an outage, support inboxes fill quickly. A clear status page gives customers a first answer: what is affected, when the issue started, and where updates will appear. That reduces repeated questions and gives your team room to fix the problem.

Small teams look more dependable

You do not need a large operations team to communicate professionally. A simple page with uptime, response times, incidents, and email subscriptions shows that your business takes reliability seriously.

Trust compounds over time

The real value is the record. Each month of clean uptime, each honest incident note, and each fast update becomes proof that customers can rely on you.

Start with a simple public page.

statuspage.app.nz gives you monitoring, alerts, and a customer-facing status page for $19/month.

Create your status page
statuspage.app.nz

Status pages, uptime monitoring, email alerts, and a customer directory backlink for developers and small teams.
